name: Neo Galaxy-Eyes Photon Dragon - Photon Howling
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超銀河眼の光子龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ネオ・ギャラクシーアイズ・フォトン・ドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－フォトン・ハウリング
name_jp_rom: Neo Gyarakushīaizu Foton Doragon - Foton Hauringu
desc:
3 Level 8 monsters
Once per turn, you can also Xyz Summon "Neo Galaxy-Eyes Photon Dragon - Photon Howling" by using 1 Rank 8 Xyz Monster you control (transfer its materials). If this card is Xyz Summoned: You can take 1 "Photon" monster from your Deck, and either Special Summon it in Defense Position or attach it to this card as material. (Quick Effect): You can detach 3 materials from this card; Tribute 1 other Xyz Monster, and if you do, negate the effects of all other face-up cards currently on the field until the end of this turn.

mentions: Neo Galaxy-Eyes Photon Dragon - Photon Howling
action: Attaches from your Deck as Xyz Material
Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
